Bash(/c/Users/smrTu/miniconda3/python -c "
import json, glob, os

dir_path = '/c/Users/smrTu/OneDrive/Documents/GithubC/CDIF/validation/testJSONMetadata'
files = glob.glob\(os.path.join\(dir_path, '*.json'\)\)
updated = 0
skipped = 0

for fp in sorted\(files\):
    with open\(fp, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
        data = json.load\(f\)
    
    subject = data.get\('schema:subjectOf', {}\)
    conforms = subject.get\('dcterms:conformsTo', []\)
    
    changed = False
    new_conforms = []
    for item in conforms:
        if isinstance\(item, dict\) and item.get\('@id'\) == 'https://w3id.org/cdif/profiles/discovery':
            new_conforms.append\({'@id': 'https://w3id.org/cdif/core/1.0/'}\)
            new_conforms.append\({'@id': 'https://w3id.org/cdif/discovery/1.0/'}\)
            changed = True
        else:
            new_conforms.append\(item\)
    
    if changed:
        subject['dcterms:conformsTo'] = new_conforms
        with open\(fp, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
            json.dump\(data, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)
            f.write\('\\n'\)
        updated += 1
    else:
        skipped += 1

print\(f'Updated: {updated}, Skipped: {skipped}, Total: {len\(files\)}'\)
")
